label: Large Language Model Reasoning
description: Brown et al. (2020) GPT-3 few-shot reasoning: sends a prompt via the Anthropic Messages API and returns the model response with token counts.

inputs.prompt: What is 2 + 2? Reply with just the number.

expected.note: Non-deterministic; pass condition is response non-empty (API key may be absent in CI, in which case dispatch returns None and the breed is SKIPPED).
